form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.5 lengths third at Sale but did record a solid 24.50 over the 435m journey. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on March 31 over 460m at this track behind Dr. Will beaten 7 lengths (26.20) in a Grade 4/5. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Collided in back straight and fell.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.31) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 FIN on March 28 over 525m at The Meadows behind Analyzation, beaten 4 lengths (30.84). Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 3.5 lengths second over 460m Geelong in 26.04. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won comfortably by 4.5 lengths at this track (26.61) beating Paw Zuri in a Grade 4/5 on March 24. Needs to find a bit more to test these.
